notes: Parsed from the Wikipedia PDF rendering of the 2026 FIFA World Cup squads page.
Ages are as listed by Wikipedia, which states ages are as of 2026-06-11.
Caps and goals are as listed by Wikipedia, which states they do not include matches after the tournament start.
Coach values are taken from the current Wikipedia page headings; Tunisia has different coaches noted for first and remaining matches.
For production use, re-fetch before release because replacements can be listed before a team’s first match.

image_source.name: The Guardian World Cup 2026 complete player guide
image_source.license_note: Image URLs were provided by the user. Verify usage rights before public/commercial use.
